headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .160 / .323 / .160.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 10, STL 12. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-3 | 2 HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.2 mph.

player_of_game.name: Jac Caglianone
player_of_game.reason: 2-3 | 2 HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game.
